description: Fingerprint-based similarity screen of a single query molecule against a database of molecules. Generates fingerprints (morgan / rdkit / maccs / atompair / torsion), scores every database molecule against the query with a similarity metric (tanimoto / dice / cosine), keeps hits at or above THRESHOLD, and writes a ranked hit table (Rank, Index, Name, SMILES, Similarity).
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a hits CSV; mutates nothing remote
QUERY is a SMILES string (or a molecule file; the first molecule is used)
INPUT is the database file: .sdf/.mol or .smi/.smiles/.txt (one SMILES per line)
METHOD defaults to morgan; THRESHOLD defaults to 0.7
usage: Set QUERY (query SMILES) and INPUT (database file). Optional: METHOD (morgan|rdkit|maccs|atompair|torsion), THRESHOLD (0-1). Output: hits.csv.
limitation: Requires the rdkit library (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline. With no database hit above THRESHOLD the CSV holds only the header row.
